skillPriority.info: Jane Doe's Basic Attack and Basic Attack: Salchow Jump are recommended and are used often and should be upgraded for more consistent damage.
Jane Doe's Special Attacks is recommended to upgrade for more damage dealt.
Jane Doe's Ultimate and Chain Attack are strongly recommended to upgrade since they have high damage multipliers and should be upgraded for more damage dealt.
Jane Doe's Assist is less recommended to upgrade and hence has a lower priority compared to her other abilities.
Jane Doe consistently dodges during her on field time, isn't a priority to upgrade but will increase damage dealt regardless.
